title: Code and reproducibility materials for glaucoma surgery trends in China (2015–2024)
description: Public-facing analysis code, codebook, and reproducibility materials for a retrospective hospital information system-based cohort study of glaucoma surgery trends in China from 2015 to 2024. The repository includes primary multivariable modeling, sensitivity analyses, projection code, and clustering analyses. Patient-level data are not included.

creators.name: Liu, Chunying
creators.affiliation: Department of Ophthalmology, West China Hospital, Sichuan University, Chengdu, Sichuan, China
